title: The Coed and the Zombie Stoner
original_title: The Coed and the Zombie Stoner
overview: When a sorority girl falls in love with a zombie, it's only a matter of time before a zombie apocalypse is unleashed on campus. The sorority girl discovers that weed is the cure. Now, she must smoke out the whole school before it's too late.
